name: SparkUI
description: Ephemeral, purpose-built web UIs generated on demand from chat conversations

port.description: Port for the SparkUI Express server (default: 3457)

pushToken.description: Push API authentication token (auto-generated if not set)

publicUrl.description: Public URL for SparkUI (e.g. https://sparkui.dev). Used for generating shareable links.

redisUrl.description: Redis connection URL for state persistence (optional — works without Redis in degraded mode)

redisUrl.label: Redis URL
redisUrl.help: Optional. SparkUI works without Redis (in-memory only).
